name: writhing_stalker.live_zombie_distraction_no_magic_guard_mcw
description: Live zombie-distraction negative guard: zombies near the player do not grant magic target acquisition through the opaque wall.

steps.label: post_load_zombie_no_magic_guard_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: no-evidence opaque-wall fixture plus zombies loads to live map

steps.label: audit_saved_noon_before_zombie_no_magic_guard
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected time before live writhing-stalker window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local noon before zombie no-magic guard

steps.label: audit_saved_monsters_before_zombie_no_magic_guard
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain required live-scenario footing
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved active_monsters proves stalker behind wall plus zombies near player before guard window

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_zombie_no_magic_guard
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded live turn window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_zombie_no_magic_guard_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded live turn window runs with zombies but no believable local stalker evidence

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_zombie_no_magic_target_probe
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact lacked no-target/no-sight target_probe lines
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves stalker does not acquire target through wall despite zombies

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_zombie_no_magic_no_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: zombie guard produced target/live-plan/strike without believable evidence
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact does not contain forbidden magic-target or strike lines

evidence_contract.claim: zombies alone do not grant magic target acquisition or live-plan permission without believable local evidence
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for writhing-stalker live fun behavior
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No save/writeback gate: these scenarios prove bounded live-plan behavior from current-run logs plus saved start-state footing; persistent map mutation is not part of the product claim.
